creator: k@free.de
text:
poudriere build of qmail-ldap fails, because distfile for the "ENHACELOGS" build option cannot be fetched.


--- tail of poudriere build.log ---

(00:00:04) => enhacelogging-ldap-20120221.patch doesn't seem to exist in /portdistfiles/qmail.

(00:00:06) fetch: http://distcache.us-west.FreeBSD.org/local-distfiles/garga/qmail/enhacelogging-ldap-20120221.patch: Not Found
(00:00:06) => Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/qmail/enhacelogging-ldap-20120221.patch
